aeo_readiness.summary: Matthews Mechanical has a basic foundation for AEO readiness but requires improvements to enhance visibility and user engagement.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build a Google Business Profile with positive reviews.
Optimize website content with targeted HVAC-related keywords for better search visibility.
Add a clear and concise website title to improve search engine understanding of the business.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business lacks a Google Business Profile, which significantly impacts local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: No Google Business Profile exists for Matthews Mechanical.
Missing opportunities to showcase reviews, photos, and business information on Google.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the web, which affects local SEO performance.
action_items: Audit and update existing citations to ensure consistency in NAP information.
Submit the business to reputable local directories and citation sites.
Monitor and manage citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data for services and reviews
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for HVAC services in Washington, D.C.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement LocalBusiness and Service schemas to provide search engines with detailed business information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Leverage community involvement and mentorship programs to create content that highlights the business's local impact and authority.
